description_long: This is a large, robust wooden storage crate with reinforced edges and a weathered, rustic appearance. The box is constructed from horizontal wooden planks, fastened with visible metal rivets, and framed by thicker wooden beams at the corners and edges. One side features a red circular stamp, suggesting it has been inspected or approved for shipping, while another side displays a white adhesive shipping label, indicating recent or ongoing transport. The wood shows signs of wear, with scratches, stains, and discoloration, giving it an authentic, utilitarian look suitable for industrial or urban environments. The top is flat and solid, making it suitable for stacking or supporting other objects. There are no visible handles or locks, and the lid appears to be a removable flat panel.
description: A large, weathered wooden storage crate with reinforced edges, a red inspection stamp, and a shipping label. The crate has a rustic, utilitarian look and a flat, stackable top.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wooden planks, reinforced edges, and a red inspection stamp on the lower right.
description_view_1: This side features the same wooden construction but is distinguished by a white shipping label affixed to the upper right.
description_view_2: Similar to the front, this side also displays the red inspection stamp, but the stamp is more centered.
description_view_3: This view shows a plain wooden side with no visible stamps or labels, just the weathered wood and reinforced edges.
